description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish handbag from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsPurple bag with one main zippered compartmentSmocked fabric panel and elasticated pouch with magnetic button closure in frontInner separator and synthetic lining with zippered pocketsOne zippered pocket and branding at backTwo short handles for carrying easeMaterial and CareFabric, syntheticWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 30 cmWidth: 39 cm
